skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst for the first time after using Burst Skill. Affects self.
skill1.note: Intro trigger. Modeled as plain fullBurstEnter; the 'first time after using Burst Skill' gate is assumed always-true because the sim casts her burst every rotation (B3). No chainGate/selfCast condition.

skill1.kitLine: Intro: Critical damage ▲ 20.28% continuously. This effect cannot be removed. Effect persists after revival.
skill1.note: 'Cannot be removed' and 'persists after revival' are inert in sim (no dispel/revival mechanics).

skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst for the first time without using own Burst Skill. Affects self.
skill1.note: Highlight trigger. Mutually exclusive with Intro. Only applies when she does NOT cast her own burst — the sim always casts her burst, so this never fires in the modeled scenario. KEY GAP when comp prevents her from bursting (see documentedConfounds[0]).

skill1.kitLine: Highlight: Critical damage ▲ 20.28% continuously. This effect cannot be removed. Effect persists after revival.
skill1.note: Same value as Intro crit damage. Mutually exclusive branch.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects self if in Intro status.
skill1.note: The 'if in Intro status' condition is implicitly assumed true (she always bursts). No explicit status check in the block.
Intro-branch sustained. Correct value and duration.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects self if in Highlight status.
skill1.note: Highlight-branch trigger. Mutually exclusive with Intro.
Highlight-branch sustained — 3.9× the Intro value. This is the material damage gap when she cannot burst.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when an ally or self destroys an enemy's part. Affects all allies (except self).
skill2.note: Part-destruction trigger unsupported. Inert in v1 single-boss (partless) scope.

skill2.kitLine: Mute: Gains immunity to Noise Pollution continuously. Stacks up to 3 times.
skill2.note: Defensive/hit-rate mechanic. Inert in sim (no Noise Pollution sources modeled).

skill2.kitLine: Activates when an ally or self destroys an enemy's part. Affects self.
skill2.note: Part-destruction trigger unsupported. Inert in v1 single-boss (partless) scope.
Effect of the part-destruction trigger. Never fires because the trigger is unsupported and the sim has no parts.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when performing a Full Charge attack. Affects self.
skill2.note: Trigger is shotFired, not fullChargeAttack. Acceptable for RL (chargeFrames=60, every shot is a full charge). Auto-filled from offline parser.

skill2.kitLine: Sustained Damage ▲ 318.14% for 3 sec. Stacks up to 2 times.
skill2.note: Correct value, duration, and stack cap.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects the stage target.
skill2.note: 'Stage target' = the single boss in v1. Correct.

skill2.kitLine: Deals 63.33% of final ATK as sustained damage every 1 sec for 9 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1] effects[0] dot atkPct 63.33 durationSec 9 intervalSec 1

burst.note: Single-boss sim: all enemies = the boss.
Team-amp debuff on enemy. Correct value and duration.

burst.kitLine: Deals 18.43% of final ATK as sustained damage every 1 sec for 9 sec.
burst.where: burst[0] effects[1] dot atkPct 18.43 durationSec 9 intervalSec 1

burst.kitLine: Affects the enemy if the enemy is the stage target.
burst.note: Single boss = stage target. No explicit stage-target gate needed in v1.

burst.kitLine: Deals 181.2% of final ATK as sustained damage every 1 sec for 9 sec.
burst.where: burst[1] effects[0] dot atkPct 181.2 durationSec 9 intervalSec 1

burst.kitLine: Activates while the skill user is in Highlight status. Affects all allies (except self).
burst.note: Highlight-only branch. She is always Intro in the sim (always bursts), so this never fires.

burst.kitLine: Noise Pollution: Hit Rate ▼ 100% for 1 sec.
burst.note: Hit-rate debuff on allies. Inert in sim (auto-play, hit-rate not modeled for damage). Also Highlight-only.

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies if the skill user is in Highlight status.
burst.note: Highlight-only trigger for Mute stack removal.
Defensive stack mechanic. Inert — Mute is unmodeled and this is Highlight-only.

documentedConfounds.text: COLD ROOT CAUSE CONFIRMED (ks-extracts finding): in graded comp N5 (Privaty/SWHA alternate), she makes 0 bursts — never reaches B3 slot — so she stays in Highlight, but the override hard-codes Intro (60.19% sustained). Should be 235.03% sustained in that comp.
documentedConfounds.why: Directly explains the 0.824 ratio. The override assumes she always bursts (Intro), but the graded comp prevents her from bursting. The 235.03% vs 60.19% sustained gap is ~3.9× on a 10s buff every Full Burst cycle — a massive damage swing. Proposed fix: chainGate selfCast/selfNotCast on fullBurstEnter.

documentedConfounds.text: Intro/Highlight mutual exclusion is not enforced by the block schema — the override simply omits the Highlight branch rather than gating on burst-cast state.
documentedConfounds.why: Any comp where she does not cast her burst will get the wrong (Intro) sustained value. This is the structural cause of the COLD rating.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: unsupported trigger 'Activates when an ally or self destroys an enemy's part' — part-destruction Sustained 68.04% for 15s skipped.
documentedConfounds.why: v1 scope is partless single boss. This effect never triggers in the sim's target scenario. Would matter for multi-part bosses.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2/burst: Mute, Noise Pollution, and Mute-stack mechanics are unmodeled.
documentedConfounds.why: Purely defensive/hit-rate mechanics. No damage impact in auto-play sim. Inert regardless of comp.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2/burst blocks were auto-filled from the offline parser (blablalink prose) on 2026-07-16, not hand-verified.
documentedConfounds.why: Provenance note. The values match the char-extract prose exactly (63.33%, 18.43%, 181.2%, 25.09%, 318.14%). No discrepancy found.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2 trigger is shotFired rather than fullChargeAttack.
documentedConfounds.why: RL weapons have chargeFrames=60; every shot is a full charge. shotFired is behaviorally equivalent for this weapon type. Would be wrong for non-RL weapons but she is RL-only.

authorIntentSummary: The override author modeled Diesel: Winter Sweets as an always-bursting B3 (Intro state only): permanent Crit Damage +20.28% and Sustained Damage +60.19% for 10s on every Full Burst, plus parser-derived skill2 (Full-Charge sustained 318.14% ×2 stacks, 63.33%/s DoT on burst) and burst (Damage Taken +25.09%, two DoTs at 18.43%/s and 181.2%/s). The Highlight branch (Sustained 235.03%) is deliberately omitted as mutually exclusive with Intro, flagged as the key uncertainty. The COLD 0.824 board rating is confirmed to stem from this assumption: in the graded N5 comp she never reaches B3, stays in Highlight, and should receive 235.03% sustained instead of 60.19%. Part-destruction and Mute/Noise-Pollution mechanics are documented as inert in v1 partless-boss scope.
